title: "TRSE units: SPECTRUM"

# SPECTRUM

These paths are relative to `units/SPECTRUM/` in the TRSE tree. Reference a unit with `@use "<path>"` (no `.tru` extension).

## Files

- `gfx`
- `memory`
- `music`
- `screen`
- `sound`
- `text/txt`
